# RedResumes — Free ATS-friendly resume builder with AI writing help

## About
RedResumes is a free online resume builder that helps job seekers create
ATS-friendly resumes without design or technical expertise. Users fill in
their work history, education, and skills through a guided, step-by-step
interface, then choose from professionally designed templates built to pass
Applicant Tracking Systems. An AI writing assistant suggests bullet points
and professional summary language based on the user's experience and target
role.

## What We Do
- Build ATS-optimized resumes through a guided, step-by-step editor
- Generate AI-suggested bullet points and professional summaries
- Offer free PDF export with no paywall or subscription required
- Provide multiple professionally designed, ATS-tested templates
- Require no sign-up to start or finish a resume

## Who We Serve
Job seekers at any career stage — from first-time applicants to career
changers — who want a professional, ATS-compliant resume without paying for
design help or a download fee.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://redresumes.com/
- Resume Builder: https://redresumes.com/builder
